pull_request.title: [scripts] Remove outdated VS Code settings
pull_request.body:
## Summary

Remove outdated C/C++, assembly, and build-tool settings from VS Code configuration templates. The codebase is now fully Rust, so these entries no longer apply.

## Changes

### `settings-linux.json`
- Remove `--with-cached-options` from `rust-analyzer.check.overrideCommand` (no longer supported by `z`).
- Remove `C_Cpp.default.compilerPath` and `C_Cpp.files.exclude` settings.
- Remove `[asm-intel-x86-generic]` language-specific overrides.
- Remove C build artifact patterns (`*.d`, `*.o`, `*.out`) from `files.exclude`.
- Remove header comment referencing GCC compiler path setup.

### `settings-windows.json`
- Remove comment about `C_Cpp.default.compilerPath` being intentionally omitted.
- Remove `[asm-intel-x86-generic]` language-specific overrides.
- Remove C build artifact patterns (`*.d`, `*.o`, `*.out`) from `files.exclude`.

commit_summaries.message:
[scripts] B: Outdated VS Code Settings for Linux

The VS Code settings template for Linux (`settings-linux.json`) contained
several outdated entries left over from when the project included C/C++ and
assembly sources. The codebase is now fully Rust, so these settings no longer
apply.

Changes:
- Remove `--with-cached-options` from `rust-analyzer.check.overrideCommand`,
  as this flag is no longer supported by the `z` build utility.
- Remove `C_Cpp.default.compilerPath` and `C_Cpp.files.exclude` settings,
  since no C/C++ source files remain in the repository.
- Remove `[asm-intel-x86-generic]` language-specific overrides, since no
  assembly files remain in the repository.
- Remove C build artifact patterns (`*.d`, `*.o`, `*.out`) from
  `files.exclude`, keeping only `*.elf`.
- Remove the header comment referencing the GCC compiler path setup.

[scripts] B: Outdated VS Code Settings for Windows

The Windows VS Code settings template (`settings-windows.json`) contained
entries left over from when the project included C/C++ and assembly sources.
The codebase is now fully Rust, so these settings no longer apply.

Changes:
- Remove comment about `C_Cpp.default.compilerPath` being intentionally
  omitted, since C/C++ tooling is no longer relevant.
- Remove C build artifact patterns (`*.d`, `*.o`, `*.out`) from
  `files.exclude`, keeping only `*.elf`.
- Remove `[asm-intel-x86-generic]` language-specific overrides, since no
  assembly files remain in the repository.
